Bash(node --input-type=commonjs << 'EOF'
const Database = require\('./node_modules/better-sqlite3'\)
const sqliteVec = require\('./node_modules/sqlite-vec'\)
const db = new Database\(':memory:'\)
sqliteVec.load\(db\)
db.exec\(`CREATE TABLE test \(
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  doc_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  page_num INTEGER NOT NULL,
  chunk_idx INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  text TEXT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE\(doc_id, page_num, chunk_idx\)
\)`\)
db.exec\('CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vec_test USING vec0\(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, embedding float[2]\)'\)

// Test WITHOUT OR REPLACE \(old approach\)
const r1 = db.prepare\('INSERT INTO test \(doc_id, page_num, chunk_idx, text\) VALUES \(?,?,?,?\)'\).run\('doc1', 1, 0, 'hello'\)
console.log\('Plain INSERT lastInsertRowid:', r1.lastInsertRowid, typeof r1.lastInsertRowid\)
db.prepare\('INSERT INTO vec_test \(id, embedding\) VALUES \(?, ?\)'\).run\(r1.lastInsertRowid, Buffer.from\(new Float32Array\([1,2]\).buffer\)\)
console.log\('Plain INSERT vec: OK'\)

// Test WITH OR REPLACE \(new approach\)
const r2 = db.prepare\('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO test \(doc_id, page_num, chunk_idx, text\) VALUES \(?,?,?,?\)'\).run\('doc1', 1, 1, 'world'\)
console.log\('OR REPLACE lastInsertRowid:', r2.lastInsertRowid, typeof r2.lastInsertRowid\)
db.prepare\('DELETE FROM vec_test WHERE id = ?'\).run\(r2.lastInsertRowid\)
db.prepare\('INSERT INTO vec_test \(id, embedding\) VALUES \(?, ?\)'\).run\(r2.lastInsertRowid, Buffer.from\(new Float32Array\([3,4]\).buffer\)\)
console.log\('OR REPLACE vec: OK'\)
EOF)
